title: TenSura (That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime)
description: TenSura (That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime) is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to reincarnate into the world of TenSura!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Tensura/MP_Tensura_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Tensura/MP_Tensura_promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Tensura/MP_Tensura_overview.webp)
---

**TenSura (That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime)** is a fantasy based modpack based on the anime/novel "That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime". Packed to the brim with spirits, magic, skills, characters from the novels and a race selection system enjoy multiple playthroughs filled with adventure and wonder! Strike out on your own and perhaps build your own town with minecolonies but be careful this modpack includes a variety of your favourite TenSura characters, demons and monsters inhabit this world, so your towns future always hangs in the balance...

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/tensura-suraimu)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/tensura-suraimu)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/sMIw9yrpnPs?si=DNkoTnqwHfghrGo4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Tensura/MP_Tensura_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Heaven And Back** - Death is never the end, reincarnation can grasp your soul but will you choose the light or the dark.
- [✔️] **Dungeons Below** - Why only travel across the lands? Traverse the depths as well, dungeons are sprawled all across this vast realm.
- [✔️] **Challenging Travels** - This world isn't easy, the strongest rule over the weak, attacks aren't always physical, watch your spiritual back.
- [✔️] **Lively World** - Your not alone in this world, goblins, dwarves and more inhabit this world, perhaps traveling along isn't such a good idea.
- [✔️] **Slime Time** - Throwing spells around isn't easy but magic is a way of life, obtain skills of various grades and perhaps magic will be yours!

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Tensura/MP_Tensura_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
